description_long: This is a dark brown fedora hat with a wide, slightly irregular brim and a pinched crown. The hatband is adorned with several decorative items, including what appear to be colored pencils or cigar-like objects tucked into the band on one side. The crown has a classic fedora pinch at the front, giving it a distinctive, stylish silhouette. The brim is broad and flat, with subtle undulations that add character to the overall shape. On the back of the hatband, there is a small rectangular accent, possibly a buckle or decorative patch. The surface of the hat appears to be made of felt or a similar soft material, giving it a matte, slightly textured finish.
description: A dark brown fedora hat with a wide, flat brim and a pinched crown, featuring colored decorative items tucked into the hatband.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pinched crown and several colored items tucked into the hatband on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cluster of colored decorative objects in the hatband and the hat's wide brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth back of the crown and the brim's even extension, with decorative items partially visible.
description_view_3: Back view showing a small rectangular accent on the hatband and the overall shape of the brim and crown.
attribute_brim_style: wide and flat with slight undulations
attribute_crown_shape: pinched front with medium height and indented sides
